zh.Watling Street, Wroxeter, Shropshire, En: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾萊希特
zh.Wroxeter, Shropshire, England,: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾萊希特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Forester of Watling Street於1520年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾萊希特時，他的父親John Forester, The Younger36歲，母親Alice Charlton51歲。他於1533年與Joyce Upton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾萊希特結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年3月13日享年71歲。

zh-hans.Watling Street, Wroxeter, Shropshire, En: 英国英格兰史洛普爾萊希特
zh-hans.Wroxeter, Shropshire, England,: 英国英格兰史洛普爾萊希特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Forester of Watling Street于1520年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾萊希特时，他的父亲John Forester, The Younger36岁，母亲Alice Charlton51岁。他于1533年与Joyce Upton在英国英格兰史洛普爾萊希特结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年3月13日享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Forester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester   (see   Forrest  ).

variants.name: Forrester
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English forester ‘officer in charge of a forest or lord's hunting ground’ (Old French forestier, Anglo-Norman forester). See Forrest .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Forester of Watling Street was born in 1520, in Wroxeter, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Forester, The Younger, was 36 and his mother, Alice Charlton, was 51. He married Joyce Upton in 1533, in Wroxeter, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 March 1591, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Forester of Watling Street est né en 1520, à Wroxeter, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Forester, The Younger, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Charlton, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Joyce Upton en 1533, à Wroxeter, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1591, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Forester of Watling Street 1520 in Wroxeter, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Forester, The Younger 36 und seine Mutter Alice Charlton 51. Er hat 1533 in Wroxeter, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Joyce Upton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. März 1591 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forester of Watling Street è nato il nel 1520 nel Wroxeter, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Forester, The Younger, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice Charlton, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Joyce Upton nel 1533, nel Wroxeter, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 marzo 1591, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Forester of Watling Streetが1520年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウロクセターで生まれた時，父John Forester, The Youngerは36歳，母Alice Charltonは51歳であった。1533年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウロクセターでJoyce Uptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年3月13日に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Forester of Watling Street(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 록세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Forester, The Younger(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Charlton(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1533년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 록세터에서 Joyce Upton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 3월 13일 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forester of Watling Street nasceu em 1520, em Wroxeter, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Forester, The Younger, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice Charlton, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Joyce Upton em 1533, em Wroxeter, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1591, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Forester of Watling Street родился в 1520 г. в местности роксетир, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Forester, The Younger было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Charlton, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce Upton в 1533 г. в местности роксетир, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 марта 1591 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Forester of Watling Street nació en 1520, en Wroxeter, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Forester, The Younger, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice Charlton, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Joyce Upton en 1533, en Wroxeter, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1591, a la edad de 71 años.
